articles.title: INDYCAR Updates Sunday Indianapolis 500 Qualifying Schedule - INDYCAR.com
articles.description: PPG Presents Armed Forces Qualifying will start at noon ET Sunday at Indianapolis Motor Speedway, with a split-group practice at 9:30 a.m.
articles.content: INDYCAR has announced an updated schedule for PPG Presents Armed Forces Qualifying for the 110th Indianapolis 500 presented by Gainbridge after persistent rain forced the postponement of Day One of q… [+2533 chars]
